thesis_bull: gold_permanent_overlay policy mandates a permanent 10% GLD allocation as a crisis/inflation diversifier. Deterministic ENTRY signal fired (Permanent allocation policy confirmation passed).

invalidation_condition: If Strategy A exits GLD on a future routine (e.g., GLD drops below 210d MA or is outranked), then the 10% Strategy C overlay must be re-opened as a standalone position. Monitor at next EOD.

confidence_notes: Policy is unambiguous; the only reason this is NO_TRADE is the overlap with Strategy A.
risk_manager_notes: Reconciliation overlap: GLD already opened at 14.64% of account via Strategy A; Strategy C's 10% target is satisfied (and exceeded) by that single position. Opening additional shares would double-book the same symbol — disallowed by sanity. Per CLAUDE.md (avoid double-counting overlapping allocations).
